problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: Combining Shape memory alloy phase transition with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
